heading: Criminal penalty
label: 1338 Criminal penalty
text: Any person who violates the provisions of this chapter shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and shall on conviction thereof be subject to a fine of not more than $10,000.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 11 and is classified to .section 10 of Pub. L. 89–92section 1339 of this title

Amendments1970— substituted provisions that violators shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and subject to fine, for provision that if any part of this chapter be held invalid, other provisions thereof shall not be affected. See Separability note set out under .Pub. L. 91–222section 1331 of this title

Effective Date of 1970 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except where otherwise specified, see , set out in part as a note under .Pub. L. 91–222section 3 of Pub. L. 91–222section 1331 of this titleJan. 1, 1970
